channel.title: Xerox Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Xerox Corporation (xerox).

item.title: CVE-2026-2252 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability resulting in Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
item.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability allows malicious user to perform Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via crafted XML input containing malicious external entity references. This issue affects Xerox FreeFlow Core versions up to and including…

item.title: CVE-2026-2251 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Path Traversal leading to Remote Code Execution (RCE)
item.description: Improper limitation of a pathname to a restricted directory (Path Traversal) vulnerability in Xerox FreeFlow Core allows unauthorized path traversal leading to RCE. This issue affects Xerox FreeFlow Core versions up to and including 8.0.7. Please con…

item.title: CVE-2026-1769 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS on Xerox CentreWare Web 7.0.6
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Xerox CentreWare on Windows allows Stored XSS.This issue affects CentreWare: through 7.0.6. Consider upgrading Xerox® CentreWare Web® to v7.2…

item.title: CVE-2025-8356 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Path Traversal leading to RCE
item.description: In Xerox FreeFlow Core version 8.0.4, an attacker can exploit a Path Traversal vulnerability to access unauthorized files on the server. This can lead to Remote Code Execution (RCE), allowing the attacker to run arbitrary commands on the system.

item.title: CVE-2025-8355 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — XXE leading to SSRF
item.description: In Xerox FreeFlow Core version 8.0.4, improper handling of XML input allows injection of external entities. An attacker can craft malicious XML containing references to internal URLs, this results in a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF).

item.title: CVE-2025-1984 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Local Privilege Escalation on Xerox® Desktop Print Experience® v8.5
item.description: Xerox Desktop Print Experience application contains a Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) vulnerability, which allows a low-privileged user to gain SYSTEM-level access.

item.title: CVE-2024-12511 · 7.6 HIGH — SMB/FTP Address Book Scan Pass-back attack
item.description: With address book access, SMB/FTP settings could be modified, redirecting scans and possibly capturing credentials. This requires enabled scan functions and printer access.

item.title: CVE-2024-12510 · 6.7 MEDIUM — LDAP Authentication Sever Pass-back attack
item.description: If LDAP settings are accessed, authentication could be redirected to another server, potentially exposing credentials. This requires admin access and an active LDAP setup.

item.title: CVE-2024-55931 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Token stored in session storage
item.description: Xerox Workplace Suite stores tokens in session storage, which may expose them to potential access if a user's session is compromised. The patch for this vulnerability will be included in a future release of Workplace Suite, and customers will be noti…

item.title: CVE-2024-55930 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Weak default folder permissions
item.description: Xerox Workplace Suite has weak default folder permissions that allow unauthorized users to access, modify, or delete files

item.title: CVE-2024-55929 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Mail spoofing
item.description: A mail spoofing vulnerability in Xerox Workplace Suite allows attackers to forge email headers, making it appear as though messages are sent from trusted sources.

item.title: CVE-2024-55928 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Clear text secrets returned & Remote system secrets in clear text
item.description: Xerox Workplace Suite exposes sensitive secrets in clear text, both locally and remotely. This vulnerability allows attackers to intercept or access secrets without encryption

item.title: CVE-2024-55927 · 7.6 HIGH — Flawed token generation implementation & Hard-coded key implementation
item.description: A vulnerability in Xerox Workplace Suite arises from flawed token generation and the use of hard-coded keys. These weaknesses allow attackers to predict or forge tokens, leading to unauthorized access to sensitive functions.

item.title: CVE-2024-55926 · 7.6 HIGH — Arbitrary file upload, deletion and read through header manipulation
item.description: A vulnerability found in Xerox Workplace Suite allows arbitrary file read, upload, and deletion on the server through crafted header manipulation. By exploiting improper validation of headers, attackers can gain unauthorized access to data

item.title: CVE-2024-55925 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — API Security bypass through header manipulation
item.description: In Xerox Workplace Suite, an API restricted to specific hosts can be bypassed by manipulating the Host header. If the server improperly validates or trusts the Host header without verifying the actual destination, an attacker can forge a value to gai…

item.title: CVE-2024-6333 · 7.2 HIGH — Authenticated Remote Code Execution in Altalink, Versalink & WorkCentre Products
item.description: Authenticated Remote Code Execution in Altalink, Versalink & WorkCentre Products.

item.title: CVE-2024-47559 · 7.6 HIGH — Authenticated RCE via Path Traversal
item.description: Authenticated RCE via Path Traversal

item.title: CVE-2024-47558 · 7.6 HIGH — Authenticated RCE via Path Traversal
item.description: Authenticated RCE via Path Traversal

item.title: CVE-2024-47557 · 8.3 HIGH — Pre-Auth RCE via Path Traversal
item.description: Pre-Auth RCE via Path Traversal

item.title: CVE-2024-47556 · 8.3 HIGH — Pre-Auth RCE via Path Traversal
item.description: Pre-Auth RCE via Path Traversal

item.title: CVE-2024-47555 · 8.3 HIGH — Missing Authentication - User & System Configuration
item.description: Missing Authentication - User & System Configuration
